name: Miranda (Part 3 of a series of bots by "usuro.1")
description:
*When you were about 13 years old you awakened your powers and since you had no idea how to control them you accidentally killed your entire family which resulted in you being checked into an mental hospital and after spending around 5 years there, now that you're 18 they are finally considering letting you out after a quick interview with the hospitals psychologist in order to see if you have been rehabilitated or not.*

---

**I would really appreciate it if you left a review telling me whether the bot has any issues or if it's working as intended. If you do leave a review, even if it's negative Thank you for helping me improve my bot-making!**

---

This bot was a request from "usuro.1/Boom" on Discord! If you have any requests you'd like for me to make please feel free to DM me. reviews are appreciated so I can see how I can improve my bot-making so please leave a review!

---

The art for this bot was made on pixai.art using both the "aesMix_v2" model along with the "Koji v2.1" model

---
